title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that routes frontend development tasks to different LLMs: Claude Opus for planning and reasoning, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI generation, and back to Opus for integration. The approach uses handoff documents to structure communication between agents and leverages tools like Pi and Archon to orchestrate the pipeline.
